sentences.text_original: 好久不见！你最近怎么样？
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn! Nǐ zuì jìn zěn me yàng?
sentences.text_translation: Ko'rishmaganimizga ancha bo'ldi! Yaqinda ahvoling qalay?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Давно не виделись! Как ты в последнее время?
sentences.text_translation_en: Long time no see! How have you been lately?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还不错。我换了一份新工作。
sentences.pinyin: Hái bú cuò. Wǒ huàn le yí fèn xīn gōng zuò.
sentences.text_translation: Yomon emas. Yangi ishga o'tdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Неплохо. Я сменил работу.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not bad. I switched to a new job.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 真的吗？你现在在哪儿工作？
sentences.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Nǐ xiàn zài zài nǎr gōng zuò?
sentences.text_translation: Rostdanmi? Hozir qayerda ishlaysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Правда? Где ты сейчас работаешь?
sentences.text_translation_en: Really? Where do you work now?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 在一家外企做市场助理。
sentences.pinyin: Zài yì jiā wài qǐ zuò shì chǎng zhù lǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Bir chet el kompaniyasida marketing yordamchisi bo'lib ishlayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В иностранной компании, ассистентом по маркетингу.
sentences.text_translation_en: At a foreign company, as a marketing assistant.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 听起来不错！你喜欢这份工作吗？
sentences.pinyin: Tīng qǐ lái bú cuò! Nǐ xǐ huan zhè fèn gōng zuò ma?
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshiga o'xshaydi! Bu ishni yoqtirasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Звучит неплохо! Тебе нравится эта работа?
sentences.text_translation_en: Sounds good! Do you like this job?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 挺喜欢的。虽然压力比以前大，但是能学到很多东西。
sentences.pinyin: Tǐng xǐ huan de. Suī rán yā lì bǐ yǐ qián dà, dàn shì néng xué dào hěn duō dōng xi.
sentences.text_translation: Ancha yoqtiraman. Garchi avvalgidan ko'ra bosim ko'proq bo'lsa-da, ko'p narsa o'rganaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень нравится. Хотя стресса больше, чем раньше, зато можно многому научиться.
sentences.text_translation_en: I really like it. Although there's more pressure than before, I can learn a lot.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你每天工作时间长吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān gōng zuò shí jiān cháng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Har kuni ish vaqting uzunmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя длинный рабочий день?
sentences.text_translation_en: Are your working hours long each day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 一般八个小时，有时候会加班。
sentences.pinyin: Yì bān bā ge xiǎo shí, yǒu shí hou huì jiā bān.
sentences.text_translation: Odatda sakkiz soat, ba'zan qo'shimcha ishlayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Обычно восемь часов, иногда задерживаюсь.
sentences.text_translation_en: Usually eight hours, sometimes I work overtime.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 周末也加班吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zhōu mò yě jiā bān ma?
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari ham ishlaysanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: По выходным тоже работаешь сверхурочно?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you work overtime on weekends too?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不一定。如果有重要的项目，周末也要去公司。
sentences.pinyin: Bù yí dìng. Rú guǒ yǒu zhòng yào de xiàng mù, zhōu mò yě yào qù gōng sī.
sentences.text_translation: Har doim emas. Agar muhim loyiha bo'lsa, dam olish kunlari ham kompaniyaga boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не обязательно. Если есть важный проект, то и по выходным приходится ездить в офис.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not always. If there's an important project, I have to go in on weekends too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你的休息时间变少了吧？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ de xiū xi shí jiān biàn shǎo le ba?
sentences.text_translation: Unda dam olish vaqting kamayib qoldimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда у тебя стало меньше времени на отдых?
sentences.text_translation_en: So you have less rest time now, right?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 确实。但是休息的时候我会好好放松。
sentences.pinyin: Què shí. Dàn shì xiū xi de shí hou wǒ huì hǎo hao fàng sōng.
sentences.text_translation: Haqiqatan ham. Lekin dam olganimda yaxshilab dam olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Действительно. Но когда отдыхаю, я хорошо расслабляюсь.
sentences.text_translation_en: Indeed. But when I rest, I relax properly.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你平时怎么放松？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píng shí zěn me fàng sōng?
sentences.text_translation: Odatda qanday dam olasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты обычно расслабляешься?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you usually relax?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 周末我常去健身房运动，或者约朋友看电影。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōu mò wǒ cháng qù jiàn shēn fáng yùn dòng, huò zhě yuē péng you kàn diàn yǐng.
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari ko'pincha sport zaliga boraman yoki do'stlarim bilan kelishib kino ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: По выходным я часто хожу в спортзал или зову друзей в кино.
sentences.text_translation_en: On weekends I often go to the gym, or arrange to see a movie with friends.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这个习惯很好。工作再忙也要注意身体。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè ge xí guàn hěn hǎo. Gōng zuò zài máng yě yào zhù yì shēn tǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda yaxshi odat. Ish qanchalik ko'p bo'lsa ham, sog'liqqa e'tibor berish kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это хорошая привычка. Как бы ни был занят работой, нужно следить за здоровьем.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's a great habit. No matter how busy work is, you should look after your health.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。健康比什么都重要。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Jiàn kāng bǐ shén me dōu zhòng yào.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri. Salomatlik hamma narsadan muhim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Здоровье важнее всего.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. Health is more important than anything.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你对未来有什么计划吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ duì wèi lái yǒu shén me jì huà ma?
sentences.text_translation: Kelajak uchun qanaqa rejalaring bor?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А какие у тебя планы на будущее?
sentences.text_translation_en: So do you have any plans for the future?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想先积累经验，以后有机会自己创业。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xiān jī lěi jīng yàn, yǐ hòu yǒu jī huì zì jǐ chuàng yè.
sentences.text_translation: Avval tajriba to'plamoqchiman, keyin imkon bo'lsa o'z biznesimni boshlamoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сначала хочу накопить опыт, а потом, если будет возможность, открыть своё дело.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to gain experience first, and later start my own business if I get the chance.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你一定可以的！相信你。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yí dìng kě yǐ de! Xiāng xìn nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Albatta uddalaysan! Senga ishonaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя обязательно получится! Верю в тебя.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can definitely do it! I believe in you.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢鼓励！我会努力的。
sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie gǔ lì! Wǒ huì nǔ lì de.
sentences.text_translation: Dalda berganing uchun rahmat! Harakat qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо за поддержку! Я буду стараться.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks for the encouragement! I'll work hard.
sentences.speaker: B
